mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_image_attachment ( original_file_name, stored_file_name, s3_key, content_type, file_size, alt_text, description, use_yn, create_user, create_dttm, update_user, update_dttm ) VALUES ( #{originalFileName}, #{storedFileName}, #{s3Key}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize}, #{altText}, #{description}, #{useYn}, #{createUser}, NOW(), #{updateUser}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT image_seq, original_file_name, stored_file_name, s3_key, content_type, file_size, alt_text, description, use_yn, create_user, create_dttm, update_user, update_dttm FROM tb_image_attachment WHERE image_seq = #{imageSeq}

SELECT image_seq, original_file_name, stored_file_name, s3_key, content_type, file_size, alt_text, description, use_yn, create_user, create_dttm, update_user, update_dttm FROM tb_image_attachment WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY image_seq DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_image_attachment SET alt_text = #{altText}, description = #{description}, update_user = #{updateUser}, update_dttm = NOW() WHERE image_seq = #{imageSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UPDATE tb_image_attachment SET use_yn = 'N', update_user = #{updateUser}, update_dttm = NOW() WHERE image_seq = #{imageSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
